description: Style NoteAdd a fresh twist to your accessories this summer by wearing a classic adidas timepiece with updated design details. Sporty at heart but stylish on your wrist, this watch makes for a great buy!Product DetailsCase style: Digital watch with plastic square caseStrap style: Black stylish rubber strap with a tang claspFeatures: Stopwatch, chrono, timer and digital modesWater resistant 5 ATM that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 2 yearSizeCase diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 6 mm
